message:
test(proptest): expand 4 thin proptest files from 9-12 to 25 tests each

- proptest_dancing_links: 9→25 tests (clone, monotonicity, idempotency, block diagonal)
- proptest_sparse_table: 12→25 tests (exhaustive small, index max, min≤max, prefix)
- proptest_pairing_heap: 12→25 tests (merge commutativity, interleaved ops, stress)
- proptest_r_tree: 12→25 tests (spatial consistency, nearest correctness, clone)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
